title: AlterBeta
description: A modpack for 1.20.1 that focuses on a more beta-like version of Early Release.
body:
### "Minecraft is a game about breaking and placing blocks."

AlterBeta seeks to make Minecraft fully embody that statement, while also bringing it back to a simpler time, akin to a hybrid of Beta 1.7.3 and Release 1.2.5. Creativity should be encouraged, and the player should have the ability to make their world into something they truly own.

Contents include:

- New world generation that seeks to mix Beta 1.7.3 and Release 1.2.5
- New building blocks, and new variants and purposes for older ones.
- A health overhaul that works much like Valheim's.
- Online multiplayer through a friend system.
- An overhaul to enchanting to make it fair and to break up the current meta.
- New potions and alchemy, making it something people will more likely use.
- A magical equivalent to redstone revolving around language.
- New redstone utilities.
- Better minecarts with new rails.
- Gravity generators powered by amethyst.
- Equipment qualities that can be reforged at an anvil.
- Enchantment stones that can be used to preserve enchantments upon breaking a tool.
- Music composition tools.
- Cameras and photo printing.
- Painting.
- 32 dye total dye colors, though not all can be used for everything color-related.
- Horse stat leveling.
- Horse-drawn carts.
- New ships, and airships.
- Copper equipment.
- New UI elements to help with screenshot and replay management.
- And more!

If you are interested in discussing AlterBeta, or providing suggestions, or even joining the official server, [drop by the discord!](https://discord.gg/nFa7N6eYCj) We'd be happy to have you!
